title: Chambeyronia piersoniorum

It is native to New Caledonia and is known for its unique, fan-shaped leaves. The species is also known as the 'fan palm' due to its distinctive leaf shape. Chambeyronia piersoniorum is a relatively rare species, which contributes to its limited availability in cultivation. intro: Chambeyronia piersoniorum, commonly known as the Black Palm, is a species of palm tree native to the island of New Caledonia. The Black Palm has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and preventing infections.
